body.title: Granny dispatch health is invisible — a drained/idle builder + all-defer cycles surface nothing an operator would notice
body.intention: I intend that a stalled or one-sided dispatch loop is visible at a glance, not only by hand-reading the tmux pane.
body.description:
Akien's observation 2026-07-08: if Granny logged adequately, the state below would show up immediately instead of needing a manual pane read. EVIDENCE (this session, akiendelllinux): Granny daemon alive+cycling 16h, but the live pane shows 217/217 recent dispatch attempts target=CC.0, ALL deferring reason=unavailable (CC.0 = the interactive session). Aider.0 is flagged available but has been IDLE since 2026-07-07 17:26 (last built+escalated T-memory-emit-frozen-root-post-import) — Granny never routes to it because the queued work is CC.0-targeted or untargeted apprentice-role (120 ungated apprentice sprint tickets that don't match the builder-target dispatch gate). Net: the offload loop is effectively stalled and nothing signals it.

**Shape:** (1) a periodic Granny HEALTH line (INFO, every N cycles): available builders, per-builder last-dispatch age, count of dispatchable-by-target vs deferred-unavailable, and a 'builder idle >Xh while dispatchable work exists' WARN; (2) surface it via `uu` view / channel / system_alarm (calm signal, not urgency) so an operator sees 'Aider.0 idle 16h, 0 builder-targeted tickets' without reading the pane; (3) the granny_weatherwax.log file is STALE (last write Jun 3) — the live daemon logs only to the tmux pane/stdout; reconcile so the canonical per-device log actually captures dispatch decisions (relates to the log-every-crossing rule + the instrument-dont-probe principle).

**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/granny/daemon.py (health emit + fix log sink), possibly a `uu granny health` view.

**Design rules:** log every state change + interface crossing; calm signals (no urgency flags); cooperative (the shim/daemon reports its own health).

**Scope boundary:** observability + log-sink fix ONLY; does NOT change dispatch/targeting logic (that's the separate question of why apprentice tickets aren't builder-targeted — see T-escalation-dispatch-producer-review / the merger-station work).

**Test plan:** hermetic — feed the health-summariser a fixture (1 available builder, last-dispatch 16h ago, N dispatchable-by-target=0, N deferred=217) and assert it emits the idle-builder WARN line; assert granny_weatherwax.log receives a dispatch-decision record.

**Completion criteria:** a single glance (log line or uu view) shows builder idle-age + dispatchable-vs-deferred, and the WARN fires on the observed 16h-idle-with-deferred-work condition.

**Validation:** the WARN/health line in the canonical granny log (not just the pane).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
